headline: Is Chevron Corporation (CVX) A Good Stock To Buy?
summary: Is CVX a good stock to buy now? We came across a bullish thesis on Chevron Corporation on X.com by @MoneyShow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CVX. Chevron Corporation’s share was trading at $186.76 as of February 27th. CVX’s trailing and forward P/E were 28.17 and 24.27 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Chevron […]

headline: Warren Buffett’s Oil Bet Looks Genius, Here Is What to Buy Next
summary: Warren Buffett’s long-running bet on Occidental Petroleum is looking prescient. Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) has surged 30.37% year-to-date, and the catalyst accelerating that move is the same one rattling global energy markets: the death of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on February 28, 2026, which triggered fears of Strait of Hormuz supply disruptions and sent ... headline: ExxonMobil Is Up 44% and Retail Investors Are Still Missing the Point
summary: Amidst a growing international crisis heavily involving the price of oil, shares of ExxonMobil (NYSE:XOM) are trading at $149.78 as of Wednesday, up 24% year-to-date and 39% over the past year. Retail sentiment on Reddit has shifted from a monthly average score of 37.875 (bearish) to a weekly score of 53.5 (neutral) over the past ... headline: Chevron Conflict Risks And Iraq Expansion Weigh On Valuation Story
summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) has declared force majeure and halted production at the Leviathan gas field in Israel as regional conflict escalates. The stoppage affects gas flows from one of the Eastern Mediterranean's key offshore fields, with timing for resumption not specified. Separately, Chevron has signed new oil deals in Iraq following the withdrawal of Russian firms from the country. The Iraq agreements expand Chevron's activity in one of the world's major oil producing regions. For you as an...

headline: Is Chevron (CVX) Pricing Reflecting DCF Upside And Hess Merger Expectations?
summary: If you are wondering whether Chevron's current share price aligns with its underlying value, or if the stock may be leaning too far in one direction, this article walks through the numbers so you can judge that for yourself. Chevron's share price recently closed at US$186.03, with total returns of 1.0% over the last 7 days, 6.9% over 30 days, 19.3% year to date, 28.9% over 1 year and 29.6% over 3 years, while the 5 year figure stands at 105.7%. These movements have kept Chevron on the radar...

headline: Pipeline's idling puts squeeze on Kern oil industry
summary: Independent local oil producers are being squeezed by the idling of the only crude pipeline running north to a Bay Area refinery, which leaves them few options but to have their product hauled at considerable cost to southbound pipeline interconnections in southern Kern. The San Pedro Bay Pipeline’s idling in December has revived concerns that lower pipeline volumes that started with a ...
